title: Jensia rammii
taxonomy: Jensia rammii is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants called Ericaceae. Jensia rammii is also known as a member of the genus Jensia, which is a small genus of flowering plants. More specifically, Jensia rammii is classified as a species of Jensia within the tribe Vaccinieae, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as heath plants. Jensia rammii is native to certain regions and is known to thrive in specific types of environments. Further classification of Jensia rammii may involve more detailed information about its taxonomic relationships.
